Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Amadun.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 7.

Quest Text

Description

Visit the great priest and use your omnipotence to convince him to sacrifice his ancient tribal artifacts.

Completion

Crew: “I think we should keep this little episode to our self when we report back to the foundation. We have to explain why the population has been decimated to one!“
